text.title: Knowledge Sharing Ritual Set Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Knowledge Sharing Ritual Set methodology end-to-end.

step.name: lock-cadence
step.action: Block weekly/biweekly/monthly/quarterly slots 12 weeks ahead with named presenter for the first 4 weeks.

step.name: prep-presenter
step.action: Send presenter prep doc 7 days ahead; require slide/demo draft 48h before.

step.name: hold-ritual
step.action: Hold the session; record demo when applicable.
step.output: Recording + notes captured in real time.

step.name: publish-artefact
step.action: Publish artefact under canonical path; include action_items[] with owner+due.
step.decision-gate: If action_items[] is empty, mark as skipped-with-reason and surface to lead.

step.name: close-loop-next-cycle
step.action: First 5 minutes of next instance reviews prior action_items status.
